using System;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators", "1.0")]
    public static partial class ProductFactoryKeys
    {
        public const string Premium = "premium";
        public const string Standard = "standard";
    }
}// <auto-generated />

,
  IProductFactory.ProductFactoryRegistry.g.cs:
using System;
using System;
using DesignPatterns.Creational;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators", "1.0")]
    public static partial class ProductFactoryRegistry
    {
        public static IFactoryRegistry<string, global::TestAssembly.IProductFactory> Create() => new FactoryRegistryBuilder<string, global::TestAssembly.IProductFactory>().Register("premium", () => new global::TestAssembly.PremiumProductFactory()).Register("standard", () => new global::TestAssembly.StandardProductFactory()).Build();
    }
}// <auto-generated />
// Generated by DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators.RegisterFactoryGenerator

#nullable enable
